changes: Added Residential, Commercial, Workplace, Leisure, and Service building roles.
Added resident homes, destinations, morning commutes, evening errands, and need-based happiness.
Added an optional 50-resident, 75%-happiness town goal with a community grant reward.
Made the town information panel minimizable to a compact funds and next-taxes view.
Added the Cozy Street Builder favicon.
Added population growth, housing capacity, and population status to normal mode.
Improved lightning lighting effects during storms.
